text: Implementation took three weeks longer than expected. We also had no clear onboarding checklist and did not know who owned each setup step.
The dashboard is useful and the alerts helped my team react faster, but the export feature failed twice when we needed a board report.
Great product for a small team. Setup was fast and the default templates saved us several hours.
Pricing was difficult to explain internally. The renewal discussion became tense because the value was not connected to the features we use most.
Our Salesforce integration broke after the last release. Support answered quickly, but the workaround was manual and caused reporting delays.
The product is strong, but documentation for advanced automations is thin. We had to ask support for examples that should be public.
Onboarding felt fragmented. Sales promised one workflow, customer success had another checklist, and product setup showed no progress dashboard.
The new workflow builder is much better. Latency is still noticeable when we load large customer lists.
We did not know who owned the onboarding checklist. The customer success manager was helpful, but the product did not show next steps or blockers.
We need a HubSpot integration before we can expand usage. The current CSV process works, but it is too slow for weekly operations.
Exports failed during month-end reporting. The error message was generic, so the analytics team could not tell whether the issue was permissions or data size.
Support has improved a lot. Faster responses and clearer ticket updates made the last incident easier to manage.
